nasb.text: Their kinsmen of their fathers’ households were Michael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jacan, Zia and Eber, seven.

esv.text: And their kinsmen according to their fathers’ houses: Michael, Meshullam, Sheba, Jorai, Jacan, Zia and Eber, seven.

cnv.text: 他們同家族的兄弟是米迦勒、米書蘭、示巴、約賴、雅干、細亞和希伯，共七人。

ccb.text: 他们同族的弟兄有米迦勒、米书兰、示巴、约赖、雅干、细亚和希伯，共七人。
